_comment: Documents the sanitization policy. build-kit.sh is the ENFORCER (it embeds the leak regex and exclude rules). Keep this file in sync with build-kit.sh when the policy changes.

hardExclude._why: Never copied into the kit — machine-local, personal, or full-vault clones.
globs: 02 Projects/* (every real project except the bundled Demo Project)

tokenScrub._why: Residual personal tokens in otherwise-portable assets are mapped to scaffolder placeholders.

leakGuard._why: After assembly, build-kit.sh fails the build if any of these survive anywhere in the staging tree. Bare 'atlassian.net' is intentionally NOT guarded — docs ship example org URLs; the real org is caught by 'fincompare'.
